member.name: T:Telegrator.Annotations.CallbackDataFilterAttribute
member.summary: Filter annotation that matches callback queries by their payload. Supports exact matching, prefix matching, and case-insensitive comparison.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.CallbackDataFilterAttribute.Data
member.summary: Gets the exact callback data value to match.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.CallbackDataFilterAttribute.Prefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback data prefix to match.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.CallbackDataFilterAttribute.IgnoreCase
member.summary: Gets whether the comparison is case-insensitive.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Annotations.CallbackDataFilterAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance that matches callback data exactly.
member.param: The exact callback data to match.
Whether to ignore case when comparing.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Annotations.CallbackDataFilterAttribute.WithPrefix(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an attribute that matches callback data starting with the given prefix.
member.param: Whether to ignore case when comparing.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Annotations.PrefixedTriggerWordAttribute
member.summary: Filter annotation that matches messages starting with one of the configured prefixes and optionally one of the configured trigger words.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.PrefixedTriggerWordAttribute.Prefixes
member.summary: Gets or sets the prefixes to check (e.g. "/", "!").

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.PrefixedTriggerWordAttribute.Words
member.summary: Gets or sets the trigger words to match after the prefix. When empty, any text after the prefix is accepted.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.PrefixedTriggerWordAttribute.IgnoreCase
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the comparison is case-insensitive.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.PrefixedTriggerWordAttribute.MatchWholeWord
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the trigger word must be followed by whitespace or end of string. When , /startnow would also match /start.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Annotations.PreventDoubleSubmit
member.summary: Filter annotation that prevents the same callback query from being processed twice within a specified timeout window. Useful for guarding against rapid double-taps on inline keyboard buttons.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Annotations.PreventDoubleSubmit.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the debounce window in seconds. Callback queries from the same user with the same query id received inside this window are ignored.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Annotations.RateLimitAttribute
member.summary: Convenience attribute that applies the default to a handler. The default policy allows 10 requests per 60-second sliding window per user.
member.remarks: For custom limits, create a derived preprocessor from and apply it with .

member.name: T:Telegrator.Annotations.WelcomeAttribute
member.summary: Filter annotation that matches "/start" commands sent in private chats.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Aspects.AutoDeletePostProcessor
member.summary: Post-processor that automatically deletes a bot message after a configured delay. The handler must schedule the message using .

member.name: F:Telegrator.Aspects.AutoDeletePostProcessor.MessageKey
member.summary: Extra data key used to store the message to delete.

member.name: F:Telegrator.Aspects.AutoDeletePostProcessor.DelayKey
member.summary: Extra data key used to store the deletion delay.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Aspects.RateLimitPreprocessor
member.summary: Pre-processor that limits how many updates a single user can trigger within a sliding time window. State is persisted via so the limit survives restarts when a persistent storage implementation is registered.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Aspects.RateLimitPreprocessor.MaxRequests
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of requests allowed inside the window. Override in a derived class or configure via an options object to change defaults.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Aspects.RateLimitPreprocessor.WindowSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the sliding window size in seconds.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Aspects.RateLimitPreprocessor.StateKeyPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the state key prefix. The final key is {Prefix}:{userId}.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Aspects.RateLimitPreprocessor.ResolveUserId(Telegram.Bot.Types.Update)
member.summary: Resolves the user identifier from the incoming update.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Extensions.AutoDeleteExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for scheduling automatic message deletion.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Extensions.AutoDeleteExtensions.ScheduleAutoDelete(Telegrator.Core.Handlers.IHandlerContainer,Telegram.Bot.Types.Message,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Schedules the given message for automatic deletion by . Requires the handler to be decorated with .
member.param: The delay before deletion. Defaults to 5 seconds.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Extensions.ContinuousActionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for starting continuous chat actions.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Extensions.ContinuousActionExtensions.StartContinuousAction(Telegrator.Core.Handlers.IHandlerContainer,Telegram.Bot.Types.Enums.ChatAction,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a continuous chat action in the chat associated with the current update.
member.param: The delay between repeated actions. Defaults to 4 seconds.
member.exception: Thrown when the update has no associated chat.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Extensions.ContinuousActionExtensions.StartTypingAction(Telegrator.Core.Handlers.IHandlerContainer,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a continuous "typing" action in the current chat.

member.name: T:Telegrator.TelegratorEssentialsServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Telegrator.Essentials services.

member.name: M:Telegrator.TelegratorEssentialsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddTelegratorEssentials(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers Telegrator.Essentials supporting services. Current components (filters, pre-processors, post-processors) are attribute-driven and do not require explicit DI registration, but this method is provided for future services such as persistent rate-limit stores or scheduled cleanup workers.
